DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DOCUMENT REQUESTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE PORT COMMISSION'S CONSIDERATION OF THE PROPOSED SETTLEMENT OF THIS LITIGATION IF THE SETTLEMENT IS REJECTED. THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED PLAINTIFFS' LATE RESPONSE. IN VIEW OF THE PROPOSED SETTLEMENT, DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Requests, And For Sanctions,
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants' Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Requests is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 10 days of the date of the Port Commission's consideration of the proposed settlement of this litigation if the settlement is rejected. The court has considered Plaintiffs' late response. In view of the proposed settlement, Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)

Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants City & County of San Francisco, Port of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Further Responses And Documents Production is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. The court finds that the responses and supplemental responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiffs in the amount of $1,470, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
